case_title: YORKE, ERIC VS T-MOBILE USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORKE, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC. $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUBLA (STORE MANAGER) HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2005 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ROD NUBLA
PLAINTIFF SIGNED A DECLARATION, WRIT ISSUED MAY 25,2005 WAS LOST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SUBPEONA FILED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-13-2005 AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUBLA (STORE MANAGER)
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2005, DISCHARGED AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUBLA (STORE MANAGER)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM COREY FARMER, T-MOBILE, USA, INC, NOT COPIED TO OTHER PARTY.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM ERICE G. YORKE DATED 10/5/05-NOT COPIED TO OTHER PARTY.
SENT LETTER TO DEFT, SEE COPY OF LETTER.
LETTER SENT TO MR. YORKE IN RESPONSE TO HIS FOR INFORMATION RE EXAMINATION HEARING.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUEBLA HEARING SET FOR DEC-29-2005 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-14-2005 AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUEBLA
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DAN WILLIAMS, CORPORATE COUNSEL FOR T-MOBILE, FILED.
COPY OF JUDGEMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE SENT TO DAN WILLIAMS, CORPORATE COUNSEL FOR T-MOBILE.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2005, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM DEC-29-2005 TO FEB-23-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUEBLA
PROOF OF SERVICE FOR THE 12/29/05 OEX HEARING, WAS SUBMITTED LESS THAN 3 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE.
THE CREDITOR WAS GIVEN A COPY OF THE MEMO #8.15 RE SUBMISSION OF OEX PROOF OF SERVICE LESS THAN THREE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE.
THE OEX WAS PUT OFF CALENDAR FOR THE MEANTIME UNTIL THE SUBMISSION OF THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE MEMO #8.15
COPY OF JUDGEMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE WAS MAILED TO DAN WILLIAMS, CORPORATE COUNSEL T-MOBILE.
ORDER TO ISSUE BENCH LETTER AFTER REQUIREMENTS PER MEMO #8.15 WAS SUBMITTED BY JUDGEMENT CREDITOR.
THE FILING DATE OF THE OEX PROOF OF SERVICE WAS BACKDATED TO 12/23/05 FOR COMPUTER TO ACCEPT FILING & ENABLE US TO ISSUE BENCH LETTER.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2006, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY ROD NUEBLA
OEX OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARNCE BY PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY YORKE, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORKE, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA, INC. $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00, DEFENDANT FIALED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLTFF(VIA MAIL SENT NOTE TO WAIT AT LEAST 16 WORKING DAYS;MAILED COPIES.
PLTF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION GRANTED. AMENDED JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED.
